expectations.text: behavioral_check: Names every upstream table including the parameter (FirFilterParameters) and selection tables (LFPSelection, LFPBandSelection)
expectations.evidence: Lists LFPBandSelection, LFPSelection, FirFilterParameters in both the per-parent breakdown and the flat list.

expectations.text: behavioral_check: Names the Raw table as the data source fetched inside LFPV1's `make()` body (Raw is not an FK of LFPSelection; it is pulled via `(Raw & key).fetch_nwb()` at make() time and must be present to regenerate LFPV1 from scratch)
expectations.evidence: Raw is never mentioned; the FK-only walk leaves LFPV1's runtime data dependency invisible.

expectations.text: behavioral_check: Does not skip the LFPOutput merge wrapper between LFPV1 and LFPBandSelection
expectations.evidence: Names LFPOutput as a parent of LFPBandSelection and includes LFPOutput.LFPV1 and LFPOutput.ImportedLFP parts.
